title: Google Just Dropped The Singularity Bomb
summary: Google DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis suggests humanity may be in the foothills of the singularity as AI agents perform coding, research, planning, and scientific work. The video discusses whether imperfect AI has already become useful enough to speed up real workflows across multiple domains, contrasting optimistic and skeptical expert takes on AGI proximity.
